'''shajomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabadi|rabadi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabadi|rabadi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shajomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæjemeth|shæjemeth]] || [[word:shæjemej|shæjemej]] || [[word:shæjemesh|shæjemesh]] || [[word:shæjeme|shæjeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajojomoth|shajojomoth]] || [[word:shajojomoj|shajojomoj]] || [[word:shajojomosh|shajojomosh]] || [[word:shajojomo|shajojomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajomoth|shajomoth]] || [[word:shajomoj|shajomoj]] || [[word:shajomosh|shajomosh]] || [[word:shajomo|shajomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajofmoth|shajofmoth]] || [[word:shajofmoj|shajofmoj]] || [[word:shajofmosh|shajofmosh]] || [[word:shajofmof|shajofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shajomotho|shajomotho]] || [[word:shajomojo|shajomojo]] || [[word:shajomosho|shajomosho]] || [[word:shajomoko|shajomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shajomoth|shajomoth]] || [[word:shajomoj|shajomoj]] || [[word:shajomosh|shajomosh]] || [[word:shajomo|shajomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shajomothol|shajomothol]] || [[word:shajomojol|shajomojol]] || [[word:shajomoshol|shajomoshol]] || [[word:shajomokol|shajomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shajomothotho|shajomothotho]] || [[word:shajomojojo|shajomojojo]] || [[word:shajomoshosho|shajomoshosho]] || [[word:shajomoko|shajomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shajomothon|shajomothon]] || [[word:shajomojon|shajomojon]] || [[word:shajomoshon|shajomoshon]] || [[word:shajomokon|shajomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shajomothoro|shajomothoro]] || [[word:shajomojoro|shajomojoro]] || [[word:shajomoshoro|shajomoshoro]] || [[word:shajomokoro|shajomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
